---
title: "Hunter Lane Grazing Coop awarded Gold Ridge Conservation District mini-grant"
description: "Gold Ridge RCD awarded us a mini-grant for materials to promote growth and sustainability of our grazing project"
date: 2026-06-29
categories: [grazing]
image: /images/sheep_in_pen.png
---



We are honored to have been awarded a [mini-grant](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1nlbG4zf0jMS6u-61WDK2MyG8doBsQOmkN1orxd26Fkw/preview?edit_requested=true) from [Gold Ridge Conservation District](https://goldridgercd.org). This program is possible due to funding from the [California State Coastal Conservancy - Wildfire Resilience Program](https://scc.ca.gov/wildfire-resilience-program/). 


![](/images/sheep_in_pen.png)
